title: MC Live 2022 Mobs
description: This datapack adds all the 3 mobs of minecraft live 2022, The sniffer, the rascal, and the tuff golem!
body:
# MC Live 2022 Mobs

Do you want to see the NEW minecraft Live 2022 mobs in game before release? Or, if you are from the future, do you want to see my own take on these mobs? This datapack adds all the 3 mobs of minecraft live 2022, The sniffer, the rascal, and the tuff golem!

### Sniffer

- The sniffer is an extinct mob, and to revive it, find sniffer eggs in underwater chests!
- Place the egg on land, and in 3 minecraft days, it will hatch!
- The newborn sniffer will walk around digging up seeds every few days, and depending on the biome, the seed will change!

### Rascal

- The Rascal LOVES to play hide and seek in the mines!
- When a player sees the rascal, it gains invisibility and runs away!
- If the rascal is seen 3 times, it will give you a reward before becoming neutral!
- Note: this functionality might break with multiplayer. Rascal also do not spawn naturally at the moment.

### Tuff golem

- This golem is summoned by putting a pumpkin on top of a red wool block and tuff block!
- They will move around your world peacefully picking up any items they see!
- Note: even though they ARE supposed to freeze at random times, but this functionality was not added.

This pack was only tested in 1.19. Older or newer versions might not work!

- [Also available on planetminecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/minecraft-live-2022-mobs/)
- [Subscribe to me on youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@switchedcube/)
